ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the contributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the contributor joined */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the contributor */,
  "github_username" TEXT /* GitHub username for the contributor */,
  "twitter_username" TEXT /* Twitter username for the contributor */,
  "linkedin_url" TEXT /* LinkedIn profile URL for the contributor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the contributor (e.g., Active, Inactive, Banned) */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date of the last activity by the contributor */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the contributor for better communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the project was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "contributor_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the contributors table */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the projects table */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., Code, Documentation, Bug Fix) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the contribution */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the contribution was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contribution (e.g., Accepted, Rejected, Pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Committer, PMC Member) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributor_roles" (
  "contributor_role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "contributor_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the contributors table */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the role assignment (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_role_id")
)
